sitemap_subtitle: Generate a readable site map and a public sitemap.xml file for search engines.
sitemap_overview_hint: The module centralizes published URLs for pages, posts, and active categories across locales.
sitemap_html_hint: Generates a readable HTML page to browse published content by language.
sitemap_xml_hint: Generates the public XML file used by search engines.
sitemap_write_failed_html: Unable to write the sitemap.html file.
sitemap_write_failed_xml: Unable to write the sitemap.xml file.
sitemap_directory_missing: Unable to prepare the public sitemap directory.
sitemap_public_description: Browse every published page, post, and category on the site.
